creator: greinbold@nosheep.fr
text:
Thanks for your quick answer.

My poudriere VM has 6G RAM + 3G SWAP.

root@poudriere:~ # dmesg | grep memory
real memory  = 68717379584 (65534 MB)
avail memory = 6188077056 (5901 MB)

root@poudriere:~ # swapinfo -h
Device          1K-blocks     Used    Avail Capacity
/dev/vtbd0p3      3145692      16M     3.0G     1%


It's not sufficient? How much memory would be optimal to build rust?

Regards(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #1)
